findings.issue: Original spec severity logic was inverted for lower-is-worse metrics (eval_pass_rate, trace_coverage). Fixed: _emit_signal accepts higher_is_worse parameter; severity computed correctly for each metric direction.
findings.fix_requirement: Applied. higher_is_worse=False for eval_pass_drop and trace_gap signal types.

findings.issue: eval_pass_rate and trace_coverage threshold_warn derived as midpoint between baseline and threshold_critical. Emission condition updated to trigger at threshold_warn, not only at threshold_critical.
findings.fix_requirement: Applied. Signal emitted when metric crosses threshold_warn; severity set to critical only when threshold_critical is also crossed.

findings.issue: Existing tests/test_drift_detection.py covers a different runtime module. Phase 23 tests created in tests/test_drift_signal_detection.py to avoid overwrite.
findings.fix_requirement: Applied. No existing test file modified.

approval_comment: Implementation matches design. Severity calculation corrected for inverted metrics. Vocabulary clean. All 5 tests pass. Immutability enforced. Ready for Phase 24.
